body:
SNAP Annual Cost-of-Living Adjustment (COLA)

The standard utility allowances (SUAs) are updated annually to coincide with the COLA. Effective October 1, 2025, the COLA will be as follows: Standard Utility Allowances (SUAs): Heating/Cooling SUA increase to $914.
citation_label: Massachusetts DTA Policy Online SNAP COLA 2025 Heating/Cooling SUA
heading: Heating/Cooling Standard Utility Allowance

metadata.official_publisher: Massachusetts Department of Transitional Assistance Policy Online
metadata.title: SNAP Annual Cost-of-Living Adjustment
